results.title: Punjab to end contractual hiring as Cabinet gives nod to bring 2 bills
results.description: The Punjab Cabinet on Saturday decided to offer government contracts to more than 65,000 outsourced employees by giving the nod to bring two bills, aimed at ending the practice of hiring employees through contractual and outsourcing systems in government departments. The decision was taken in a Cabinet meeting held in Chandigarh under the chairmanship of [...]

results.title: 50 hired on the spot at Peso fair
results.description: FIFTY job seekers were hired on the spot during the job fair organized by the Public Employment Service Office of the City Government of Zamboanga.

results.title: MGU UGP CAP 2026 Registration: How to Apply and Important Dates
results.description: MGU has announced its UGP 2026 programme through the CAP process. Learn how to register along with the important dates to look out for.
